# Daily Log - 2026-03-25

[[2026-03-24|← Yesterday]] | [[2026-03-26|Tomorrow →]]

Set up the new dev environment today. Had to run a bunch of commands to get
it working:

$ cd ~/Library/Application\ Support/configs && git pull origin main && brew install ollama

Grabbed dinner with Sarah afterward. She's thinking about moving to a new
apartment near the park. Watched the cycling race highlights before bed.

## Daily Questions
- One thing I learned: always back up configs before upgrading.
